sourceDesc.p: Derived from CDSL MW, PWG, PWK, AP90, and GRA source records for interoperability analysis.

projectDesc.p: tei-archival-profile-v0.1; TEI is used as the archival/textual model. Raw CDSL records are preserved as escaped source-entry quotes, while selected lexical structures are promoted into TEI entry, form, sense, citation, and relation elements.

revisionDesc.change: Included in the full machine-reviewed TEI profile.

sense.def: move, be moved, be scattered (as dust)
make agitated, stir up, shake vehemently

listBibl.head: Machine-extracted citation index; source quotes preserve the archival text.

cit.quote: <L>16095<pc>91,3<k1>ard<k2>ard<e>1 <s>ard</s> ¦ <lang>Ved.</lang> <ab>cl.</ab> 6. <ab>P.</ab> (<ab>Imper.</ab> 3. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>fdantu</s>; <ab>impf.</ab> 3. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>A/rdan</s>) <div n="to"/>to move, be moved, be scattered (as dust), <ls>RV. iv, 17, 2</ls> and <ls n="RV.">vii, 104, 24.</ls> <ab>cl.</ab> 1. <ab>P.</ab> <s>ardati</s> (<s>a/rdati</s>, ‘to go, move’, <ls>Naigh.</ls>) <div n="to"/>to dissolve, <ls>AV. xii, 4, 3</ls>, (<ab>aor.</ab> <s>ArdIt</s>, <ls>Bhaṭṭ.</ls>, <ab>perf.</ab> <s>Anarda</s>, <ls>Pāṇ. vii, 4, 71</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>) <div n="to"/>to torment, hurt, kill, <ls>L.</ls>; <div n="to"/>to ask, beg for (<ab>acc.</ab>), <ls>Ragh. v, 17.</ls> <ab>cl.</ab> 7. <s>fRatti</s>, to kill, <ls>Naigh.</ls> : <div n="vp"/><ab>Caus.</ab> <s>ardayati</s> (<ab>Subj.</ab> <s>ardayAsi</s>, <ab>Imper.</ab> 2. <ab>sg.</ab> <s>ardaya</s>, <ab>impf.</ab> <s>A/dayat</s>, 2. <ab>sg.</ab> <s>Arda/yas</s>; <ab>aor.</ab> <s>Ardidat</s>, or [after <s>mA</s>] <s>ardayIt</s>, <ls>Pāṇ. iii, 1, 51</ls>) <div n="to"/>to make agitated, stir up, shake vehemently, <ls>AV. iv, 15, 6</ls> & <ls n="AV. iv, 15,">11</ls>; <ls n="AV.">vi, 49, 2</ls>, to do harm, torment, distress, <ls>MBh.</ls> &c. (generally used in <ab>perf.</ab> <ab>Pass.</ab> <ab>p.</ab> <s>ardita</s>, <ab>q.v.</ab>), <div n="to"/>to strike, hurt, kill, destroy, <ls>RV.</ls>; <ls>AV.</ls> &c. <ab>Desid.</ab> <s>ardidizati</s>; <info whitneyroots="fd,15"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp="6P,1P,7"/> <LEND>

<L>5935<pc>1-0439<k1>ard<k2>ard
{#ard#}¦, {#a/rdati#}
<ls>DHĀTUP. 3,18.</ls> {#fdantu#} <ab>ved.</ab> {#fRAtti#}
<ls>NAIGH. 2,19.</ls> {#Anarda#}
<ls>P. 7,4,71</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
<ls>VOP. 8,53.</ls>
<div n="1"> 1) {%in Bewegung%} (der Theile) {%gerathen, zerstieben, sich auflösen%}: {#f\GA\yanta^ su\Bva1^\H parva^tAsa\ Arda\nDanvA^ni sa\raya^nta\ Apa^H#}
<ls>ṚV. 4,17,2.</ls> {#vigrI^vAso\ mUra^devA fdantu#}
<ls n="ṚV.">7,104,24.</ls> {#kU\wayA^sya\ saM SI^ryante Slo\RayA^ kA\wama^rdati#}
<ls>AV. 12,4,3.</ls> {%gehen, sich bewegen%}
<ls>NAIGH. 2,14.</ls>
<ls>DHĀTUP.</ls> {#ardita#} (<ab>caus.</ab> Form) {%gegangen%}
<ls>ŚABDAR.</ls> im <ls>ŚKDR.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%um Etwas%} (<ab>acc.</ab>) {%bitten%}
<ls>DHĀTUP.</ls> {#nirgalitAmbugarBaM SaradGanaM nArdati cAtako 'pi#}
<ls>RAGH. 5,17.</ls> {#ardita#} (<ab>caus.</ab> Form) {%erbeten%}
<ls>AK. 3,2,47.</ls>
<ls>H. an. 3,238.</ls>
<ls>MED. t. 79.</ls> <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#ardanA#} .
<div n="1">— 3) {%quälen%}
<ls>KĀŚ.</ls> <ls>VOP. 8,52.</ls> {%verwunden, tödten%}
<ls>DHĀTUP. 34,22.</ls> {#rakzaHsahasrARi — ArdIt#}
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 12,56.</ls> <ab>Vgl.</ab> das <ab>caus.</ab> — <ab>caus.</ab> {#arda/yati, Ardidat#} oder {#ArdayIt#}
<ls>VOP. 8,86.</ls> <ls n="VOP.">18,1.</ls> die letztere Form <ab>ved.</ab>
<ls>P. 3,1,51.</ls> {#kAmamardayIt#}
<ab>Sch.</ab>
<div n="1"> 1) {%in Unstätigkeit, in Unruhe versetzen, aufregen, erschüttern%}: {#a\Bi kra^nda sta\nayA\rdayo^da\Dim#}
<ls>AV. 4,15,6.</ls> <ls n="AV. 4,15,">11.</ls> {#SI\rzRA Siro 'psa\sApso a\rdaya^n#}
<ls n="AV.">6,49,2.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%verzerren%}: {#ardayitvAnilo vaktramarditaM#} (<ab>s. d.</ab>) {#janayatyataH#}
<ls>SUŚR. 1,255,18.</ls>
<div n="1">— 3) {%beunruhigen, bedrängen, quälen%}: {#tata enaM mahAvegErardayAmAsa tomarEH . tAnAgatAnsa cicCeda#}
<ls>MBH. 3,16450.</ls> {#asurAH — suragaRamardayaMstadA#}
<ls n="MBH.">1,1182.</ls> {#yErardyamAnAH suBfSaM tapastapyanti mAnavAH#}
<ls n="MBH.">3,11255.</ls> {#ardyamAnAnrakzoBiH#}
<ls>R. 3,14,16.</ls> {#yena (DanuzA) ArdidaddEtyapuraM pinAkI#}
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 2,46.</ls> {#sUryaraSmiBirarditam#}
<ls>R. 4,58,7.</ls> {#rAkzasEH — arditAH sma BfSam#}
<ls n="R.">3,14,11.</ls> {#vyasanenArditam#}
<ls>MBH. 3,2505.</ls> {#viSvAmitrArditAndfzwvA pahlavAn#}
<ls>VIŚV. 4,20.</ls> {#BayArdita#}
<ls n="VIŚV.">10,4.</ls> {#kopArdita#}
<ls>ŚUK. 39,13.</ls> {#yogabalA˚#}
<ls>BRAHMA-P. in LA. 59,2.</ls> {#kzuDArdita#}
<ls>HIḌ. 2,3.</ls> {#madanArditA#}
<ls>R. 3,23,14.</ls>
<div n="1">— 4) {%schlagen, verletzen, verwunden, tödten%}
<ls>NAIGH. 2,19.</ls>
<ls>DHĀTUP. 34,22.</ls> {#(tvamindra) Sra\va\sya\tA mana^sA vf\trama^rdayaH#}
<ls>ṚV. 10,147,2.</ls> {#Arda^yadvf\tramakf^Rodu lo\kam#}
<ls n="ṚV. 10,">104,10.</ls> {#amE^ra\mitra^mardaya#}
<ls n="ṚV.">8,64,10.</ls> <ls>VĀLAKH. 5,2.</ls> {#parA^Sara tvaM tezA\M parA^Yca\M Suzma^mardaya#}
<ls>AV. 6,65,1.</ls> {#vicaranto 'rdayansarvAnsiMhavyAGramahoragAn#}
<ls>R. 1,16,30.</ls> {#Ardidat#}
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 9,19.</ls> <ls n="BHAṬṬ.">15,90.</ls> {#ardita#} {%verletzt, verwundet%}
<ls>H. an. 3,238.</ls>
<ls>MED. t. 79.</ls> {#muzwiprahArAdiBirardite 'Nge#}
<ls>SUŚR. 1,288,5.</ls> {#kusumezuRArditA#}
<ls>PAÑCAT. 221,13.</ls> {#SAlvavARArdite tasmin#}
<ls>MBH. 3,717.</ls> {#sa tEH SarErmUrDni — rAkzasArditaH#}
<ls>R. 5,42,8.</ls> {#arditapakzABiGAtacikitsA#}
<ls>Verz. d. B. H. No. 1005.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#ati#} {%stark bedrängen%}: {#atyArdIdbAlinaH putram#}
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 15,115.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#aBi#} {%bedrängen, peinigen%}: {#aByardasi mAM suduHKam#}
<ls>R. 2,21,55.</ls> {#aByardita#}
<ls>MBH. 1,4116.</ls> {#aByardito vfzalaH . SItena pIqita ityarTaH#}
<ls>P. 7,2,25</ls>, <ls>Sch. 24</ls>
wird auch {#aByarRa#} (<ab>s. d.</ab>) {%nahe%} hierhergezogen.
<div n="p">— {#ud#} {%aufschlagen%}, von einer Woge
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 5,3,4,5.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 5,3,4,">6.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#ni#} <ab>part.</ab> {#nya^rRa#}
<ls>P. 7,2,24.</ls>
<ls>VOP. 26,112.</ls> {%aufgelöst, schwindend%}: {#sa ha nyarRaH SiSye#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 12,7,1,10.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#nis#} {%ausströmen%}: {#so 'syAyaM parANeva prARo nirardati#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 4,1,1,3.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#pra#} <ab>caus.</ab> {%abfliessen machen%}: {#tAsA\manu^ pra\vata^ indra\ panTA\M prArda^yo\ nIcI^ra\pasa^H samu\dram#}
<ls>ṚV. 6,17,12.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#prati#} <ab>caus.</ab> {%einen Andrang erwiedern%}, mit dem <ab>acc.</ab>: {#mArgaRavarzeRa rAmaM pratyardayadraRe#}
<ls>R. 6,92,32.</ls> <ab>med.</ab>: {#pratyardayata saMkrudDo rAGavaM punarAhave#}
<ls n="R. 6,">88,2.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#vi#} <ab>part.</ab> {#vyarRa#}
<ls>P. 7,2,24.</ls>
<ls>VOP. 26,112.</ls>
<div n="1"> 1) {%wegfliessen%}: {#yA UrmI vyardataH#}
[Page1-0440]
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 5,3,4,4.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%bedrängen%}: {#avyarRa#} {%nicht bedrängt%}
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 9,19.</ls> — <ab>caus.</ab> {%zerstieben machen, zerstören, vernichten%}: {#yasya^ tri\to vyoja^sA vf\traM vipa^rvama\rdaya^t#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,187,1.</ls> {#bfha^spate\ vi pa^ri\rApo^ ardaya#}
<ls n="ṚV.">2,23,14.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#sam#} <ab>part.</ab> {#samarRa#}
<ls>P. 7,2,24.</ls>
<ls>VOP. 26,112.</ls> — <ab>caus.</ab> {%verwunden%}: {#yantAramasya sahasA triBirvAREH samArdayat#}
<ls>MBH. 3,761.</ls> {#tam — vatsadantEstriBiH pArSve samArdayat#}
<ls n="MBH. 3,">11724.</ls>
<LEND>

<L>9574<pc>1-112-c<k1>ard<k2>ard √{#ard#}¦ {#fdati#} (<ls>ṚV.</ls>), {#a/rdati#} und *{#fRatti#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%zerstieben%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%aufregen%} <ls>VIDDH. 82,14</ls>. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%beunruhigen, bedrängen, quälen, hart mitnehmen%}. {#ardita#} hierher oder zum <ab>Caus.</ab> <div n="1">— 4〉 {%Jmd mit einer Bitte angehen%}. <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> {#arda/yati#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%in Unruhe versetzen, aufregen, erschüttern%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%verzerren%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%beunruhigen, bedrängen, quälen, hart mitnehmen%}. <div n="1">— 4〉 {%schlagen, verwunden, tödten, vernichten%}. <div n="p">— Mit *{#ati#} {%stark bedrängen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#aBi#} {%bedrängen, peinigen, quälen%}. <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> <ab>dass.</ab> <div n="p">— Mit {#ud#} {%aufschlagen%} (von einer Woge). <div n="p">— Mit {#ni#}. <ab>Partic.</ab> {#nya^rRRa#} {%aufgelöst, hinschwinden%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#nis#} {%ausströmen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#pra#} <ab>Caus.</ab> <div n="1">— 1〉 {%fliessen machen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 *{%aufreiben%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#prati#} <ab>Caus.</ab> <ab>Act.</ab> <ab>Med.</ab> {%einen Andrang%} <ab>u. s. w.</ab> {%erwiedern%} (mit <ab>Acc.</ab> der Person). <div n="p">— Mit {#vi#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%wegfliessen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 *{%bedrängen%}. <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> {%zerstieben machen, vernichten%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#sam#}, <ab>Partic.</ab> *{#samarRRa#} <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> {%verwunden%}. <LEND>

<L>4174<pc>0168-b<k1>ard<k2>ard {#ard#}¦ {c1c} <ab>P.</ab> [{#ardati, Anarda, ArdIt#}, <lbinfo n="a#rdituM"/> {#ardituM, ardita#} or {#arRa#}] {@1@} To afflict, <lbinfo n="tor+ment"/> torment; strike, hurt, kill; {#rakzaHsahasrARi#} {#caturdaSArdIt#} <ls>Bk. 12. 56</ls>, see {%<ab>caus.</ab>%} below. {@--2@} To beg, request, ask; <lbinfo n="nirgalitAMbuga#rBaM"/> {#nirgalitAMbugarBaM SaradGanaM nArdati cAtakopi#} <ls>R. 5. 17.</ls> {@--3@} To go. {@--4@} To move, be agitated or moved; be scattered (as dust); fly in pieces, dissolve (<ab>Ved.</ab>). (The past participle is usually {#ardita#}, but {#arRa#} when the root is preceded by {#aBi, ni, vi, saM#}; <ab>cf.</ab> <ls>P. VII. 2. 24-5</ls>). {%--<ab>Caus.</ab>%} (or {c10c} <ab>P.</ab>) {@1@} ({%a%}) To afflict, torment, distress; {#tata enaM#} <lbinfo n="mahAvegErarda#yAmAsa"/> {#mahAvegErardayAmAsa tomarEH#} <ls>Mb.</ls>; {#kAmArdita, kopa˚#}, {#Baya˚#} &c. ({%b%}) To strike, hurt, <lbinfo n="in+jure"/> injure, kill; {#yenArdidat dEtyapuraM pinAkI#} <ls>Bk. 2. 46</ls>; <ls n="Bk.">9. 19</ls>; <ls n="Bk.">15. 90.</ls> {@--2@} To stir up, rouse, agitate, shake <lbinfo n="vehement+ly"/> vehemently, make agitated or restless. {@--3@} To distort; {#ardayitvAnilo vaktramarditaM#} <lbinfo n="jana#yatyataH"/> {#janayatyataH#} <ls>Suśruta</ls>. --WITH {#ati#} to <lbinfo n="tor+ment"/> torment excessively, fall upon or <lbinfo n="at+tack"/> attack; {#atyArdIt vAlinaH putraM#} <lbinfo n="ls:Bk. 15.+ 115."/> <ls>Bk. 15. 115.</ls> {#--aBi#} to distress, afflict, pain, oppress; {#aByardito vfzalaH#} ({#SItena#} <lbinfo n="pIqi#taH"/> {#pIqitaH#}) <ls>P. VII. 2. 25</ls> <ls>Sk.</ls> {#--ni#} <ab>Ved.</ab> to stream forth, flow out. {#--pra#} to <lbinfo n="over+work"/> overwork, to work or exert oneself <lbinfo n="be+yond"/> beyond measure; to cause to flow away. {#--prati#} to oppress or press hard in [Page0168-c+ 57] return, assail in return, return an attack. {#--vi#} <ab>Ved.</ab> to go or move away; to oppress, harass, pain. ({%--<ab>caus.</ab>%}) to cause to be scattered or dissolved, destroy, annihilate. {#--saM#} {%<ab>caus.</ab>%} to pain greatly, wound, distress. <LEND>

<L>1059<pc>0114<k1>ard<k2>ard {@√ard.@}¦ Erweiterung von ar (3. 4. 8. 9) {%„in innere Bewegung%} (der Theile) {%gerathen“; zerstieben;%} Causativ: 1〉 {%erschüttern, aufregen%} [<ab>A.</ab>]; 2〉 {%schlagen, tödten, vernichten%} [<ab>A.</ab>]. Causativ mit {@prá@}, {%in Bewegung setzen, fliessen machen,%} mit {@ví@}, {%zerstieben machen, vernichten%} [<ab>vgl.</ab> <lang>lat.</lang> ardeo, dessen Begriff aus dem der innern Erregung entspringt]. <div n="H">Stamm {@ṛda:@} <div n="TS">-antu mū́radevās {620,24}. <div n="H"><ab>Imperf.</ab> {@ā́rda:@} <div n="TS">-an {313,2} (dhánvāni). <div n="H">Stamm <ab n="des">d.</ab> <ab>Caus.</ab> {@ardáya@} (betont nur {187,1}; {1022,2}; <ls>AV. 4,15,6</ls>): <div n="TS">-at {@ví:@} vṛtrám víparvam {187,1}. <div n="TS">-as 2〉 vṛtrám {973,2}; atithigvám {1022,2}.<chg type="del" n="11" src="gra"><old>— {@prá:@} nī́cīs apásas {458,12}.</old></chg> <div n="TS">-a [1〉 <ls>AV. 4,15,6</ls> udadhím] 2〉 amítram {684,10}. — {@ví:@} parirā́pas {214,14}. <LEND>
